ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample from which the spectrum was obtained */,
  "wavenumber" REAL /* Wavenumber of the measurement */,
  "absorbance" REAL /* Absorbance value at the given wavenumber */,
  "baseline_corrected" REAL /* Baseline corrected absorbance value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the spectrum belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used to collect the spectrum */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the spectrum was measured */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the spectrum was measured */,
  "measurement_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the measurement was taken (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample being analyzed */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., soil, water, gas) */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample (e.g., stored, analyzed, disposed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., FTIR, NIR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the experiment was conducted (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "experiment_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "experiment_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_analysis" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak analysis result */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum being analyzed */,
  "subtracted_peak" REAL /* Calculated subtracted peak value */,
  "subtracted_peak_hat" REAL /* Estimated corrected peak value */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the peak analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for peak analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the peak analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_analysis_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrum being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baseline_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baseline correction method */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum affected */,
  "method" TEXT /* Description of the correction method used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters associated with the correction method */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the baseline correction was applied */,
  "correction_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_baseline_corrections_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "calibration_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_calibration_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings in the report */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., final, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
